data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the room scan requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the room scan requirement (360 camera view), but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. While the linked use case mentions the room scan requirement, there are no specific details or evidence of how this is executed in the system, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or processes for room scan (360 camera view).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the room scan requirement.
